creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Update applied, thanks. 

When updating a port, please do not modify the "Date created" or "Whom" 
comments.  Those refer to the original creation, not the most recent 
version.  Confusingly, the "version required" header should be updated, 
which you did.  Also, please do not modify the $Id$ line.  CVS will 
tend to that itself. 

I made pkg/COMMENT: 

Popular virtual window manager for X.
